Contents 
  1. Description

Interface ModelOptions

All Known Subinterfaces:
AudioTranscriptionOptions, ChatOptions, EmbeddingOptions, ImageOptions, ModerationOptions, StructuredOutputChatOptions, TextToSpeechOptions, ToolCallingChatOptions
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnthropicChatOptions, BedrockChatOptions, BedrockCohereEmbeddingOptions, BedrockTitanEmbeddingOptions, DeepSeekChatOptions, DefaultChatOptions, DefaultEmbeddingOptions, DefaultStructuredOutputChatOptions, DefaultTextToSpeechOptions, DefaultToolCallingChatOptions, ElevenLabsTextToSpeechOptions, GoogleGenAiChatOptions, GoogleGenAiTextEmbeddingOptions, MistralAiChatOptions, MistralAiEmbeddingOptions, MistralAiModerationOptions, MistralAiOcrOptions, OllamaChatOptions, OllamaEmbeddingOptions, OpenAiAudioSpeechOptions, OpenAiAudioTranscriptionOptions, OpenAiChatOptions, OpenAiEmbeddingOptions, OpenAiImageOptions, OpenAiModerationOptions, PostgresMlEmbeddingOptions, StabilityAiImageOptions, VertexAiMultimodalEmbeddingOptions, VertexAiTextEmbeddingOptions
public interface ModelOptions
Interface representing the customizable options for AI model interactions. This marker interface allows for the specification of various settings and parameters that can influence the behavior and output of AI models. It is designed to provide flexibility and adaptability in different AI scenarios, ensuring that the AI models can be fine-tuned according to specific requirements.
Since:
0.8.0
Author:
Mark Pollack
